iterations.theme: Marin Turić's Spiritual Journey: From Traditional Faith to Community Life and Fatherhood
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration covers the entire podcast, detailing Marin's personal and spiritual journey, his family life, and his experience with the Eho community.
